title: Pungent Garlicky Polish Garlic Bowl
description: A garlicky, snappy, kid-friendly Polish dish featuring chopped parsley, perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Preheat a sous vide machine to 183°F (84°C).
You can also cook the potatoes in a pot of boiling water for 10-12 minutes after boiling.
Meanwhile, cook the chorizo in a large skillet over medium-high heat, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks, until browned, about 5 minutes.
In a separate pan, combine the garlic, parsley, egg yolk, and cream, and cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture is smooth and heated through.
Once the potatoes are cooked, toss them with the chorizo and butter in the skillet.
Transfer the potato and chorizo mixture to the sous vide container and cover with plastic wrap.
Place the container in the preheated water bath and cook for 2 hours and 30 minutes.
Remove the container from the water bath and carefully remove the potato and chorizo mixture.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Optional: serve with a dollop of sour cream or a sprinkle of chives.
